title: LEGO City Cement Mixer Truck Toy - Educational Construction Site Vehicle Model w/ 3 Minifigures, Rotating Drum & Pouring Function - Birthday Gift Idea for 7+ Year Old Boys - 60478
features: CONSTRUCTION TOYS FOR KIDS – Fans of big vehicles and building sites will love the LEGO City Cement Mixer truck toy for 7+ year old boys and girls
AUTHENTIC FUNCTIONS – The cement mixer toy features a revolving drum and 8 rubber tyres, plus an Archimedes’ screw system that allows kids to pour the cement elements when the drum rotates
3 LEGO CITY MINIFIGURES – The model kit comes with driver, construction worker and architect minifigures, plus accessories including a wheelbarrow, road sign, 2 barriers, a clipboard, spade and broom
BUILDING SITE ROLE PLAY – Lower the cement chute, turn a dial to rotate the drum for mixing and dispensing the LEGO cement elements and tilt the cab to access the engine
BIRTHDAY GIFTS FOR KIDS – This educational toy provides a fun introduction to engineering and makes a great gift for 7+ year old boys and girls who love mighty machines and hands-on creative play
EASY TO BUILD – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive adventure where they can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models using 3D instructions
CEMENT TRUCK TOY WITH AUTHENTIC FUNCTIONS – Kids can lower the cement chute, turn a dial to rotate the drum for mixing and dispensing the LEGO cement elements and tilt the cab to access the engine
description: From the manufacturer Construction truck toy for kids Fans of mighty construction vehicles will love this LEGO City Cement Mixer toy building set for kids aged 7 and over. Build and play! Kids enjoy an immersive building experience before setting out on imaginative construction adventures. LEGO City Cement Mixer Mighty truck Authentic 8-wheel design with rubber tyres. Just like the real thing Large drum with an Archimedes screw system. Mix and pour Kids turn the dial to mix and pour the LEGO cement. Tilting driver’s cab Lift the cab to reveal the toy engine. Accessories for play Includes a wheelbarrow, barriers, broom and spade. Includes 3 minifigures Driver, construction worker and architect minifigures. A city without limits Combine this set with other LEGO City playsets (sold separately) for even bigger construction adventures.

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
